name: agent-chat
description: Agent Chat UI — Feature-Modul. Wird in nextjs-chat integriert (exec-06).

notes.removed: react-syntax-highlighter + @types/react-syntax-highlighter (ersetzt durch react-shiki), framer-motion (ersetzt durch motion)
notes.added: react-shiki (VS Code Syntax Highlighting), motion (framer-motion successor), zustand (State Management), auto-animate (zero-config List-Animations), rehype-sanitize (HTML Sanitization)
notes.evaluate-later: assistant-ui (Radix-style AI Chat Primitives), jotai (feingranularer atomic State), tiptap-ai-autocomplete (Agent Composer Autocomplete), novel (Tiptap + AI + Slash-Commands)
notes.shadcn-ui: Button, Badge, Dialog, ContextMenu, Sheet — kommen aus nextjs-chat/src/components/ui/ bei Integration
notes.api-routes: api/ Ordner enthält Next.js API Routes — werden nach nextjs-chat/src/app/api/ kopiert bei Integration
notes.frontend-tools: lib/frontend-tools.ts — MCP-style UI-Mutations (Chart Symbol, Panel, Navigation)
